sentences: <ENT_026> <REF_020> filters the encoder tokens by a learnable cross-attention map predictor.
After distinguishing these tokens in the decoder network, it focuses only on foreground tokens to reduce computational costs.
<ENT_026> introduces the scoring module, aux-heads in the encoder, and the Top-k queries selection module for the decoder.
In <FIG_006>, the light orange box represents <ENT_026>.
Firstly, it determines the saliency of tokens, fed as input to the encoder, using the scoring network that selects top <MATH_115> tokens.
Secondly, the aux-head takes the top-k tokens from the output of the encoder network.
Finally, the top-k tokens are used as the decoder object queries.
